translationText: The Reality.
What is the Reality?
What will make you understand what the Reality is?
Thamood and Aad denied the Catastrophe.
As for Thamood, they were annihilated by the Overwhelming.

arabicText: وَأَمَّا عَادٌۭ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍۢ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍۢ
translationText: And as for Aad; they were annihilated by a furious, roaring wind.

arabicText: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍۢ وَثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًۭا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍۢ
translationText: He unleashed it upon them for seven nights and eight days, in succession. You could see the people tossed around, as though they were stumps of hollow palm-trees.
Can you see any remnant of them?

arabicText: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
translationText: Then Pharaoh came, and those before him, and the Overturned Cities steeped in sin.

arabicText: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةًۭ رَّابِيَةً
translationText: But they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with an overpowering grip.

arabicText: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
translationText: When the waters overflowed, We carried you in the cruising ship.

arabicText: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةًۭ وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌۭ وَٰعِيَةٌۭ
translationText: To make it a lesson for you-so that retaining ears may retain it.

arabicText: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ
translationText: Then, when the Trumpet is sounded a single time.

arabicText: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ
translationText: And the earth and the mountains are lifted up, and crushed, with a single crush.
On that Day, the Event will come to pass.
And the heaven will crack; so on that Day it will be frail.

arabicText: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ ثَمَٰنِيَةٌۭ
translationText: And the angels will be ranged around its borders, while eight will be carrying the Throne of your Lord above them that Day.

arabicText: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌۭ
translationText: On that Day you will be exposed, and no secret of yours will remain hidden.

arabicText: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
translationText: As for him who is given his book in his right hand, he will say, "Here, take my book and read it.
I knew I would be held accountable."
So he will be in pleasant living.
In a lofty Garden.
Its pickings are within reach.

arabicText: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
translationText: "Eat and drink merrily for what you did in the days gone by."

arabicText: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
translationText: But as for him who is given his book in his left hand, he will say, "I wish I was never given my book.
And never knew what my account was.
If only it was the end.
My money cannot avail me.
My power has vanished from me."
"Take him and shackle him.
Then scorch him in the Blaze.

arabicText: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍۢ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًۭا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
translationText: Then in a chain which length is seventy cubits tie him up.

arabicText: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
translationText: For he would not believe in God the Great.
Nor would he advocate the feeding of the destitute.
So he has no friend here today.
And no food except scum.
Which only the sinners eat."
Indeed, I swear by what you see.
And by what you do not see.
It is the speech of a noble messenger.

arabicText: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍۢ ۚ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
translationText: And it is not the speech of a poet-little do you believe.

arabicText: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍۢ ۚ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
translationText: Nor is it the speech of a soothsayer-little do you take heed.
It is a revelation from the Lord of the Worlds.
Had he falsely attributed some statements to Us.
We would have seized him by the right arm.
Then slashed his lifeline.

arabicText: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَٰجِزِينَ
translationText: And none of you could have restrained Us from him.
Surely, it is a message for the righteous.
And We know that some of you will reject it.
And it is surely a source of grief for the unbelievers.
Yet it is the absolute truth.
So glorify the name of your Lord, the Magnificent.
